summary: Draft extern/Dolphin THP slice split from PR #2617, touching only extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c. The diff refactors __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN to reuse the local THPFileInfo* info pointer, replace a raw mcuBuffer pointer derived from ((u8*) info + 0x10) with repeated THPFileInfoMCUBufferView casts, and access THP fields through info instead of __THPInfo. The PR was closed unmerged and superseded by PR #2632 after an EditorConfig workflow edge case filtered out all changed files.

key_files.role: Only changed file; THP decoder source containing __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN cleanup.

what_changed.text: Removed local THPCoeff** mcuBuffer initialized from raw byte-offset pointer math on info.
Replaced mcuBuffer[index] uses with ((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[index] in Huffman decode and inverse DCT calls.
Changed repeated __THPInfo field accesses to use the existing local THPFileInfo* info variable for xPixelSize, components, and quantTabs.
PR body states this was an isolated path slice from origin/master for extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp, split from PR #2617 for easier review.
Issue comment states the PR was superseded by combined Dolphin support split PR #2632 because the extern-only split hit an EditorConfig workflow edge case where all changed files were filtered out.

smart_moves.text: The diff keeps the already available info pointer and uses it consistently rather than repeatedly reading the global __THPInfo.
The raw mcuBuffer offset access is replaced with a named view type, matching the loaded typed-fields-over-pointer-math standard direction.
The PR was split by directory/subsystem with a narrow scope, making the THP extern changes easier to review independently.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a struct overlay/view exists for a known layout slice, prefer the typed view over raw byte-offset pointer math for repeated buffer accesses.
If a function already caches a global object pointer in a local variable, using that local consistently can simplify field access without changing the visible algorithm.

naming_conventions.name: THPFileInfoMCUBufferView
naming_conventions.text: The diff uses THPFileInfoMCUBufferView as the named view exposing mcuBuffer entries from a THPFileInfo-backed address.

naming_conventions.name: info
naming_conventions.text: The local THPFileInfo* info is used as the canonical local handle for __THPInfo field access in this function.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Typed overlay cast for layout recovery
assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Use ((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[index] to express an offset-backed array access instead of maintaining a separate THPCoeff** obtained via ((u8*) info + 0x10).
Retain THPFileInfo* info = __THPInfo and route later field accesses through info.

review_feedback.author: fjooord
review_feedback.text: Superseded by the combined Dolphin support split PR #2632. The extern-only split hit the EditorConfig workflow edge case where all changed files are filtered out.

follow_up_queries: PR #2632 combined Dolphin support split THPDec.c THPFileInfoMCUBufferView
EditorConfig workflow edge case all changed files filtered out extern-only split

notes: Diff evidence is strong for the single changed file and exact source edits.
There are no review comments and no recorded reviewer approval or requested changes.

The PR body reports full unsplit branch metrics and local git diff --check, but also states per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting would be authoritative once complete; no completed per-PR CI result is included in this slice.
The PR was closed unmerged and explicitly superseded by PR #2632, so lessons should be treated as PR-evidence-backed candidates rather than accepted project history.
raw_pr_json is truncated, but the loaded human text, diff, changed-files record, and text corpus cover the relevant intake facts.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer THPFileInfoMCUBufferView over raw mcuBuffer offset math when that view describes the layout
accepted_candidate_records.text: In __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN, PR #2618 replaces THPCoeff** mcuBuffer = (THPCoeff**) ((u8*) info + 0x10) and mcuBuffer[index] uses with ((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[index]. This supports the existing typed-fields-over-pointer-math standard for this THP layout, pending confirmation from the superseding PR.

source_update_candidates.title: THPDec.c extern Dolphin THP slice used THPFileInfoMCUBufferView for mcuBuffer access
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2618 touched extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c and used ((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[index] inside __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN in place of a raw offset-derived THPCoeff** local. Because the PR was superseded and unmerged, verify against PR #2632/current source before recording this as a durable path fact.
source_update_candidates.reason: May help future THP decoder work find the typed view used for MCU buffer access, but needs curator verification because this PR was superseded.

Do not generalize THPFileInfoMCUBufferView layout beyond the mcuBuffer accesses shown in the diff without checking current source or the superseding PR.
